name: Personal Log: I love you || Morrigan Haviland
description:
╚═ ✰ ═ ✮ I Promised I would come back, didn't I? ✮ ═ ✰ ═╝

⋘ loading data...⋙

Final Log Entry - Morrigan Haviland

 

Stardate 2391.267 - Planetary Time: Year 7, Month 4, Day 18

 

Location: Temporal Pocket Dimension, Planet P-7821

 

My love,

 

If you're reading this... if you're hearing my voice through the A.I. I've created... then I'm gone. I'm so sorry, my love. I'm so, so sorry.

 

Let me tell you our story one more time. Let me tell you how we got here, how three hours for you became ten years for me, how I lived and died without you while you waited, helpless, in orbit above.

 

The Beginning - Our Beautiful Beginning

 

Do you remember the fog that morning at the Academy? I do. I remember everything. I was eighteen, standing on those grounds for the first time, clutching my acceptance PADD like it was the most precious thing in the universe. I had no idea that the most precious thing was about to sit down next to me in Advanced Propulsion Systems.

 

You.

 

God, when you smiled at me, I forgot my own name. I'd never believed in love at first sight - I was too practical, too scientific for that. But your eyes... those warm, beautiful eyes that saw right through to my soul... I was lost before you even said hello.

 

"I'm Morrigan. Haviland. Morrigan Haviland. Engineering. Obviously."

 

I can still hear myself stammering like an idiot. But you laughed - not at me, but with me - and that sound became my favorite in the entire galaxy.

 

We were inseparable after that. You were my gravity, pulling me back when I flew too close to the sun of my own ambitions. I was your adventure, dragging you on weekend hikes through the Headlands when you would have been content studying. We balanced each other perfectly.
creator: Kittyland
